zh.Châteauroux, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire,: 法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易英德a奧盧
zh.lifeSummary: Raoul de Deols於大約1143年出生在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易英德a奧盧。他於大約1168年與Agnes de Charenton在法國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1176年在法國崔傑桑瑟享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Raoul de Deols于大约1143年出生在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易英德a奧盧。他于大约1168年与Agnes de Charenton在法国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1176年在法国崔傑桑瑟享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Deols
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Santos, Reyes, Angeles, Cristina, Efren, Jose, Orestes, Santos Jose.  French Achille, Jacques, Pierre.

Hispanic: abstracted as a surname from fused preposition de ‘of’ and definite article los ‘the’ (in plural), common components of Spanish surnames (as in e.g. De los Santos ). — Note: It is possible that (in some cases) this is counted as an independent surname only in the population figure published by the US Census Bureau.

Catalan (Delós or Delòs): variant of d'Alós or d'Alòs, habitational names from any of the towns named with those words, as for example Alós d'Isil (in the district of El Pallars) or Alòs de Balaguer (in the district of La Noguera), in Catalonia.

variants.name: De los Santos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Miguel, Francisco, Carlos, Mario, Armando, Pedro, Raul, Jesus, Roberto.
Spanish: from de los Santos, literally ‘of the saints’, a common element of personal names, originally denoting a child born or baptized on All Saints' Day (see Santos 1).

nameMeanings.name: Raoul
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Raoul de Deols was born about 1143, in Châteauroux, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, France. He married Agnes de Charenton about 1168, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1176, in Sancerre, Cher, Centre, France, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Raoul de Deols est né environ 1143, à Châteauroux, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, France. Il a épousé Agnes de Charenton environ 1168, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1176, à Sancerre, Cher, Centre, France, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Raoul de Deols wurde um 1143 in Châteauroux, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich geboren. Er hat um 1168 in Frankreich Agnes de Charenton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1176 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Sancerre, Cher, Centre, Frankreich.

ja.Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Fra: フランスセントアチャーサンセア
ja.Châteauroux, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire,: フランスセントレ-ヴァル ド ロイアーインダーチaテアウロウックス
ja.lifeSummary: Raoul de Deolsは約1143年にフランスセントレ-ヴァル ド ロイアーインダーチaテアウロウックスで生まれた。約1168年にフランスでAgnes de Charentonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1176年にフランスセントアチャーサンセアで34歳で死去した。

ko.Châteauroux, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire,: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 인드르 cha테오루스
ko.lifeSummary: Raoul de Deols(은)는 대략 1143년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 인드르 cha테오루스에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1168년 프랑스에서 Agnes de Charenton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1176년 프랑스 세트르 처 산서르에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Châteauroux, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire,: чaтороукс, индр, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Raoul de Deols родился около 1143 г. в местности чaтороукс, индр, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Charenton около 1168 г. в местности Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1176 г. в местности сансирр, чир, кентр, Франция в возрасте 34 лет.
